description_long: This object is a cylindrical plastic medicine bottle with a blue screw-on cap and a white body, labeled 'Ibuprofen Tablets, 200mg' in large, clear text. The bottle features printed directions and drug facts on its label, with the text wrapping around the curved surface. Several small, brown, hexagonal tablets are scattered near the base of the bottle, suggesting the contents inside. The cap is ribbed for grip, and the bottle appears opaque, typical for over-the-counter medication packaging. The label is simple, with black text on a white background and no visible branding or decorative elements. The overall appearance is utilitarian and designed for easy identification and use in a healthcare or urban environment.
description: A white plastic ibuprofen bottle with a blue screw cap and clear black labeling, accompanied by several brown tablets at its base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Ibuprofen Tablets, 200mg' label and several brown tablets near the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'Directions' section of the label and more visible tablets on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal label text visible, mostly showing the plain white bottle and blue cap.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the 'Drug Facts' section and partial 'Ibuprofen' label, with tablets visible at the base.
